# UnenforceableObligation artifacts

Spec obligations the LLM extractor recognized but couldn't compile to
any structural artifact. Tracked here so:

1. The team sees during review that the obligation was noticed.
2. The verifier doesn't silently drop or force-fit.
3. We have a record for prioritizing which artifact types to add next.

The current SPEC.md doesn't actually contain unenforceable obligations.
The example below is a hypothetical "Performance" section we'd add later
— included to show the artifact shape.
